changes: ✅ Implemented professional Voice Alert format: 'Attention Required: {Server} {IP}. {Metric} {Hardware} is {Value} and is in critical/warning state...'
✅ Fixed native Android service to prioritize backend voice strings over legacy hardcoded ones
✅ Enhanced 'Acknowledge' button on native alarm screen to automatically open time/justification popup in-app
✅ Added 'Metric Value' and 'Threshold' fields to both native alarm and in-app alert screens
✅ Expanded background voice triggers to include 'Warning' severity (e.g., Disk 50%)
✅ Optimized TTS pronunciation using Indian English (en-IN) locale for clearer server names
❌ (RECALLED) Attempted voice change; failed due to native service overrides and severity filtering
✅ Fixed critical mobile app crash (ClassCastException) in AlarmActivity
✅ Restored missing Server IP and Hardware details in mobile push notifications
✅ Enhanced escalation logic to trigger immediate alerts when severity upgrades from Warning to Critical
✅ Synchronized versioning (1.0.50) across API, UI, Mobile, and Go Agents
✅ Enhanced Linux network interface detection with multiple fallback methods
✅ Added uptime metric collection and visualization
✅ Improved network bandwidth calculation accuracy
✅ Fixed per-interface network metrics reporting
✅ Enhanced agent version tracking on dashboard
Fixed network bandwidth calculation for per-interface metrics
Improved time synchronization for accurate network stats
Added support for ARM64 architecture
Improved error handling in network metrics collection
Fixed network bandwidth calculation for per-interface metrics
Improved time synchronization for accurate network stats
Basic metrics collection: CPU, Memory, Disk, Network
Per-interface network metrics tracking
Automatic server registration and heartbeat
Multi-OS support: Linux, Windows, macOS, Docker, ECS Fargate
✅ Added Interface Filter to Go Agent to ignore virtual/VPN adapters
✅ Prioritized physical private IPs (192.168.x, 10.x, 172.x) for registration
✅ Implemented Adaptive IP logic in backend to auto-update server IPs
✅ Enhanced security by blocking 169.254.x.x link-local IPs from overwriting dashboard data
✅ Implemented Server ID caching in Go Agent to prevent constant re-registration
✅ Fixed issue where deleted servers immediately reappeared in dashboard
✅ Corrected UI inconsistency for server deletion permissions
✅ Improved agent stability and reduced network overhead
✅ Added Subnet Prioritization: Agent now prefers 192.168.x.x (Production) IPs over 10.x.x.x (Management/Virtual) IPs
✅ Improved multi-NIC detection for Windows servers with virtual switches
✅ Enhanced logging for IP selection process
✅ Unified versioning across all agent types
✅ Universal IP Detection: Improved virtual interface detection (Hyper-V, VMware, VirtualBox, Docker)
✅ Host IP Heuristic: Automatically avoids .1 gateway/virtual switch IPs in favor of host IPs
✅ Subnet Preference: Added support for preferred_subnet in config.json for manual overrides
✅ Security Hardening: Strict filtering of management subnets and virtual bridges
Removed Latency and LookupCount from aggregated network metrics
Updated aggregated network metrics to include only Bandwidth and PacketCount
Updated network scheduler logs to reflect changes in aggregated metrics
Fixed missing bandwidth in historical details by adding server_id metadata to aggregated metric
